texto: Spontaneity is the quality of being able to do something just because you feel like it at the moment of trusting your instincts of taking yourself by surprise and snatching from the clutches of your well-organized routine a bit of unscheduled pleasure.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Iannelli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Spontaneity is the quality of being able to do something just because you feel like it at the mom…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, instincts, spontaneity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
